Interface TermLabelRefactoring

All Superinterfaces:
RuleSpecificTask
All Known Implementing Classes:
FormulaTermLabelRefactoring, OriginTermLabelRefactoring, RemoveInCheckBranchesTermLabelRefactoring
public interface TermLabelRefactoring extends RuleSpecificTask

A TermLabelRefactoring is used by TermLabelManager.refactorGoal(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, Rule, Goal, Object, JTerm) to refactor the labels of each visited JTerm.

For more information about TermLabels and how they are maintained during prove read the documentation of interface TermLabel.

See Also:
  • TermLabel
  • TermLabelManager

  • Method Details

    • shouldRefactorOnBuiltInRule

      static boolean shouldRefactorOnBuiltInRule(Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint)

      Determines whether any refactorings should be applied on an application of the given

      BuiltInRule.

      If you perform refactorings despite this method returning false, KeY will throw an exception because the formula that contains the modality in which the contract was applied does not have a FormulaTag.

      Parameters:
      rule - the rule being applied.
      goal - the goal on which the rule is being applied.
      hint - an optional hint passed from the active rule to describe the term which should be created.
      Returns:
      whether any refactorings should be applied on an application of the given rule.

    • defineRefactoringScope

      TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope defineRefactoringScope(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm)
      Defines if a refactoring is required and if so in which TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.
      Parameters:
      state - The TermLabelState of the current rule application.
      services - The Services used by the Proof on which a Rule is applied right now.
      applicationPosInOccurrence - The PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent which defines the JTerm that is rewritten.
      applicationTerm - The JTerm defined by the PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent.
      rule - The Rule which is applied.
      goal - The optional Goal on which the JTerm to create will be used.
      hint - An optional hint passed from the active rule to describe the term which should be created.
      tacletTerm - The optional taclet JTerm.
      Returns:
      The required TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.

    • refactorLabels

      void refactorLabels(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm term, LabelCollection labels)
      This method is used to refactor the labels of the given JTerm.
      Parameters:
      state - The TermLabelState of the current rule application.
      services - The Services used by the Proof on which a Rule is applied right now.
      applicationPosInOccurrence - The PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent which defines the JTerm that is rewritten.
      applicationTerm - The JTerm defined by the PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent.
      rule - The Rule which is applied.
      goal - The optional Goal on which the JTerm to create will be used.
      hint - An optional hint passed from the active rule to describe the term which should be created.
      tacletTerm - The optional taclet JTerm.
      term - The JTerm which is now refactored.
      labels - The new labels the JTerm will have after the refactoring.
